form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign seventh of 16 at this track Rtg 66+ November 8 over 1400m, 4 len behind Angel Undercover with 58.5kg at $41. Previously first up; seventh of 11 at Pinjarra Scarpside Rtg 66+ June 7 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Wubin Gold with 59kg at $16. Will take great benefit from this run.
